name: Growth Starter Kit
description: Everything you need to launch your online presence — domain setup, hosting, and a lightweight landing page to start capturing leads from day one.

name: Pro Lead Engine
description: A complete lead generation system with automated email sequences, CRM integration, and analytics dashboard to scale your pipeline.

name: Conversion Accelerator
description: Advanced A/B testing, heat maps, and conversion rate optimization consulting to turn your traffic into qualified leads.

name: Content Strategy Blueprint
description: A 90-day content plan tailored to your audience, including SEO keyword research, editorial calendar, and copy templates.

name: Social Media Growth Pack
description: Done-for-you social media management across three platforms with scheduled posts, community engagement, and monthly performance reports.

name: Brand Identity Suite
description: Full visual identity package including logo design, brand guidelines, color palette, typography system, and social media templates.

name: Email Marketing Accelerator
description: High-converting email campaigns with audience segmentation, automated workflows, and detailed performance tracking to nurture and convert leads.

name: Video Marketing Bundle
description: Professional video production for ads, explainer videos, and social content — scripting, filming, editing, and optimization included.

name: PPC Campaign Management
description: End-to-end paid advertising management for Google Ads and Facebook Ads, including keyword research, ad copy, budget optimization, and monthly reporting.

name: SEO Optimization Package
description: Complete on-page and technical SEO audit with implementation roadmap, link-building strategy, and 3 months of performance tracking.

name: Webinar Funnel Builder
description: Turnkey webinar setup with landing pages, email sequences, live streaming support, and follow-up automation to generate and nurture leads.

name: Customer Retention System
description: Loyalty program design, retention email campaigns, and re-engagement strategies to maximize customer lifetime value.

name: Influencer Outreach Program
description: Connect with micro and macro influencers in your niche — outreach, negotiation, contract management, and campaign tracking included.

name: Mobile App Marketing Launch
description: Full go-to-market strategy for mobile apps including App Store Optimization, paid user acquisition, PR outreach, and launch event coordination.
